title: machaeranthera pinnatifida var. scabrella
intro: Machaeranthera pinnatifida var. scabrella, also known as Scabredbutterweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Machaeranthera pinnatifida var. scabrella can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for topical and internal use.
